Based on the README.md in `projects/webapp/docs/README.md`, here are all the API endpoints mentioned:

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| `GET` | `/api/users` | List all users |
| `POST` | `/api/users` | Create a new user |
| `GET` | `/api/health` | Health check |

The README also lists some TODO items for future enhancements:
- Add database persistence (currently in-memory)
- Add authentication middleware
- Add input validation on POST
- Add pagination for user listing
